---
name: "❓ Question / Discussion"
about: "Ask a question about agent setup or API configuration."
title: "[QUESTION] "
labels: ["question", "help wanted"]
assignees: []

---

### 🔍 Question Topic
A clear topic for your inquiry (e.g., WordPress API, Gemini Rate Limits).

### 🛰 Agent / Workflow Context
- **n8n Version**: (e.g., 1.x.x)
- **Specialized Node**: (Which node are you working on?)

### 📝 Your Question
How can we help? Please provide as much context as possible.

### 📉 Tried Already
What have you attempted to resolve this for?

### 🎯 Goal
What are you trying to achieve? (e.g., "I want to send the lead to Slack instead of Google Sheets").
